interactions.intention: Retrieve the latitude and longitude of all airports.

interactions.utterance: What percentage of each continent's area is represented in the database?

interactions.intention: Find the total area of continents that are associated with more than one country.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(AREA) FROM MONDIAL_CONTINENT JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ON MONDIAL_CONTINENT.NAME = MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.CONTINENT GROUP BY MONDIAL_CONTINENT.NAME HAVING COUNT(MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES.COUNTRY) > 1

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which border-sharing countries were part of the same historical dependency?
interactions.intention: Find neighboring countries that were part of the same historical dependency.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MP1.COUNTRY AS COUNTRY1, MP2.COUNTRY AS COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP1 ON MB.COUNTRY1 = MP1.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP2 ON MB.COUNTRY2 = MP2.COUNTRY WHERE MP1.WASDEPENDENT = MP2.WASDEPENDENT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me which border-sharing countries have the same type of government?
interactions.intention: Find neighboring countries with the same type of government.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MP1.COUNTRY AS COUNTRY1, MP2.COUNTRY AS COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP1 ON MB.COUNTRY1 = MP1.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP2 ON MB.COUNTRY2 = MP2.COUNTRY WHERE MP1.GOVERNMENT = MP2.GOVERNMENT

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which neighboring countries became independent after 1900?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MP1.COUNTRY AS COUNTRY1, MP2.COUNTRY AS COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP1 ON MB.COUNTRY1 = MP1.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP2 ON MB.COUNTRY2 = MP2.COUNTRY WHERE MP1.INDEPENDENCE > DATE '1900-01-01' AND MP2.INDEPENDENCE > DATE '1900-01-01'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Are there any neighboring countries where one has been independent since the 19th century while the other only gained independence in the 20th century?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MP1.COUNTRY AS COUNTRY1, MP2.COUNTRY AS COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP1 ON MB.COUNTRY1 = MP1.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP2 ON MB.COUNTRY2 = MP2.COUNTRY WHERE (MP1.INDEPENDENCE < DATE '1900-01-01' AND MP2.INDEPENDENCE >= DATE '1900-01-01') OR (MP2.INDEPENDENCE < DATE '1900-01-01' AND MP1.INDEPENDENCE >= DATE '1900-01-01')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you find pairs of neighboring countries where one was a dependency of the other?
interactions.intention: Find neighboring countries where one was historically dependent on the other.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MP1.COUNTRY AS COUNTRY1, MP2.COUNTRY AS COUNTRY2 FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP1 ON MB.COUNTRY1 = MP1.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP2 ON MB.COUNTRY2 = MP2.COUNTRY WHERE MP1.DEPENDENT = MP2.COUNTRY OR MP2.DEPENDENT = MP1.COUNTRY

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(MB.LENGTH) AS TOTAL_BORDER_LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP1 ON MB.COUNTRY1 = MP1.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP2 ON MB.COUNTRY2 = MP2.COUNTRY WHERE MP1.GOVERNMENT = 'parliamentary democracy' AND MP2.GOVERNMENT = 'parliamentary democracy'

interactions.speaker: User

interactions.speaker: User

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the details of all ethnic groups along with their percentages?
interactions.intention: Retrieve details of all ethnic groups and their percentages.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, PERCENTAGE FROM MONDIAL_ETHNICGROUP

interactions.speaker: User

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the unique countries where these estuaries are found?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which rivers flowing into estuaries are also recorded in the river data?
interactions.intention: Identify rivers flowing into estuaries that are recorded in the river data.

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What provinces are associated with the rivers flowing into estuaries in Germany?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the lakes connected to rivers flowing into estuaries in Switzerland?
interactions.intention: Find lakes connected to rivers flowing into estuaries in Switzerland.

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total length of rivers flowing into estuaries in Switzerland?
interactions.intention: Calculate the total length of rivers flowing into estuaries in Switzerland.

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which river flowing into an estuary in Switzerland has the largest area?
interactions.intention: Find the river flowing into an estuary in Switzerland with the largest area.

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which seas have islands located in them?
interactions.intention: Find seas that have islands located in them.

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the provinces in Japan along the Sea of Japan?
interactions.intention: List provinces in Japan that are along the Sea of Japan.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT PROVINCE FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA WHERE COUNTRY = 'J' AND SEA = 'Sea of Japan'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names of islands located in the Mediterranean Sea?
interactions.intention: Find the names of islands located in the Mediterranean Sea.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.ISLAND FROM MONDIAL_ISLANDIN JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.SEA = MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA = 'Mediterranean Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which island in the Mediterranean Sea has the largest elevation?
interactions.intention: Find the island in the Mediterranean Sea with the largest elevation.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME, MAX(ELEVATION) AS MAX_ELEVATION FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_ISLANDIN ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.ISLAND = MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME WHERE MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.SEA = 'Mediterranean Sea' GROUP BY NAME ORDER BY MAX_ELEVATION DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Are there mountains on any islands in the Sea of Japan?
interactions.intention: Check if there are mountains on islands located in the Sea of Japan.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_ISLANDIN ON MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND = MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.ISLAND WHERE MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.SEA = 'Sea of Japan'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which seas have the highest number of islands?
interactions.intention: Find seas ranked by the number of islands they contain.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA, COUNT(MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.ISLAND) AS ISLAND_COUNT FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA JOIN MONDIAL_ISLANDIN ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.SEA = MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA GROUP BY MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA ORDER BY ISLAND_COUNT DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total area of all islands in the Mediterranean Sea?
interactions.intention: Calculate the total area of islands in the Mediterranean Sea.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(AREA) AS TOTAL_AREA FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_ISLANDIN ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.ISLAND = MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME WHERE MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.SEA = 'Mediterranean Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which mountains are located on islands in the Black Sea?
interactions.intention: Find mountains located on islands in the Black Sea.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MOUNTAIN FROM MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_ISLANDIN ON MONDIAL_MOUNTAINONISLAND.ISLAND = MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.ISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SEA ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.SEA = MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA WHERE MONDIAL_GEO_SEA.SEA = 'Black Sea'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which province has the highest number of seas?
interactions.intention: Find the province with the highest number of seas.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PROVINCE, COUNT(DISTINCT SEA) AS SEA_COUNT FROM MONDIAL_GEO_SEA GROUP BY PROVINCE ORDER BY SEA_COUNT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the average area of islands in the Mediterranean Sea?
interactions.intention: Calculate the average area of islands in the Mediterranean Sea.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AVG(AREA) AS AVERAGE_AREA FROM MONDIAL_ISLAND JOIN MONDIAL_ISLANDIN ON MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.ISLAND = MONDIAL_ISLAND.NAME WHERE MONDIAL_ISLANDIN.SEA = 'Mediterranean Sea'

interactions.speaker: User

interactions.intention: Find names of countries that share borders along with their capitals.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT C1.NAME, C2.NAME, C1.CAPITAL, C2.CAPITAL FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS B JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY C1 ON B.COUNTRY1 = C1.CODE JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY C2 ON B.COUNTRY2 = C2.CODE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the total length of borders for each country?
interactions.intention: Calculate the total border length for each country.

interactions.speaker: User

interactions.intention: Rank neighboring country pairs based on their border lengths.

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: List all neighboring countries and the lengths of their borders for Albania.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY1, COUNTRY2, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE COUNTRY1 = 'AL'

interactions.utterance: What are the rivers originating in countries that share borders?
interactions.intention: Find rivers originating in countries that share borders.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.RIVER, C1.NAME FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS B JOIN MONDIAL_COUNTRY C1 ON B.COUNTRY1 = C1.CODE JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE S ON S.COUNTRY = C1.CODE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which neighboring country pairs have borders longer than 200 km?
interactions.intention: Find neighboring country pairs with borders longer than 200 km.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNTRY1, COUNTRY2, LENGTH FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS WHERE LENGTH > 200

interactions.speaker: User

interactions.intention: List all neighboring countries and their border lengths.

interactions.utterance: What are the names of the rivers that flow through these mountains?

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the maximum elevation of these mountains?
interactions.intention: Determine the highest elevation of the mountains linked to rivers that flow into seas merging with other seas.

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Show the lakes that these rivers flow through.
interactions.intention: Find lakes through which rivers linked to mountains and seas that merge flow.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT LAKE FROM MONDIAL_RIVERTHROUGH WHERE RIVER IN (SELECT NAME FROM MONDIAL_RIVER WHERE MOUNTAINS IN (SELECT DISTINCT MOUNTAINS FROM MONDIAL_RIVER WHERE SEA IN (SELECT SEA1 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH)))

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the average length of these rivers?
interactions.intention: Calculate the average length of rivers linked to mountains and seas that merge.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AVG(LENGTH) FROM MONDIAL_RIVER WHERE MOUNTAINS IN (SELECT DISTINCT MOUNTAINS FROM MONDIAL_RIVER WHERE SEA IN (SELECT SEA1 FROM MONDIAL_MERGESWITH))

interactions.speaker: User

interactions.intention: Identify the mountains linked to the Andaman Sea.

interactions.speaker: User

interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me the inflation rate for that country?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the inflation rate of the country with the highest GDP.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT INFLATION FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY WHERE COUNTRY = (SELECT COUNTRY FROM MONDIAL_ECONOMY ORDER BY GDP DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY)

interactions.speaker: User

interactions.speaker: User

interactions.utterance: Which continents do the countries with borders longer than 300 km belong to?
interactions.intention: Identify the continents of countries whose borders are longer than 300 km.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MB.COUNTRY1, MB.COUNTRY2, MC.NAME FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ME1 ON MB.COUNTRY1 = ME1.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_ENCOMPASSES ME2 ON MB.COUNTRY2 = ME2.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_CONTINENT MC ON ME1.CONTINENT = MC.NAME WHERE MB.LENGTH > 300

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the forms of government for countries sharing borders longer than 150 km?
interactions.intention: Retrieve forms of government for countries with borders longer than 150 km.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MB.COUNTRY1, MB.COUNTRY2, MP1.GOVERNMENT AS COUNTRY1_GOV, MP2.GOVERNMENT AS COUNTRY2_GOV FROM MONDIAL_BORDERS MB JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP1 ON MB.COUNTRY1 = MP1.COUNTRY JOIN MONDIAL_POLITICS MP2 ON MB.COUNTRY2 = MP2.COUNTRY WHERE MB.LENGTH > 150

interactions.intention: Find countries with rivers listed in both estuaries and river locations.

interactions.utterance: Can you list all provinces where the rivers in estuaries also appear in sources?

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT E.RIVER FROM MONDIAL_GEO_ESTUARY E JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_SOURCE S ON E.RIVER = S.RIVER JOIN MONDIAL_GEO_RIVER R ON E.RIVER = R.RIVER

interactions.intention: Find the desert with the smallest area.

interactions.speaker: User
